content:
IVX HOLDINGS — FINAL BLOCKER ELIMINATION (PRODUCTION READY)

OBJECTIVE

Do not create new features.

Do not generate another audit.

Eliminate every remaining production blocker until the release status changes from:

🔴 NOT READY

to

🟢 PRODUCTION READY

==================================================
BLOCKER 1 — AUTHENTICATION
==================================================

Fix every route returning HTTP 500.

Expected behavior:

401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden

Never HTTP 500.

Audit:

- Owner routes
- Admin routes
- Member routes
- Investor routes
- Buyer routes
- AI routes

Return:

- Root cause
- Files modified
- Tests executed
- HTTP status before
- HTTP status after

==================================================
BLOCKER 2 — CHAT
==================================================

Eliminate RLS recursion.

Audit:

conversation_participants

conversations

messages

rooms

Replace recursive RLS policies with safe authenticated-user policies.

Verify:

✓ Conversation creation
✓ Direct messages
✓ Group chat
✓ Message history
✓ Ordering
✓ Read receipts
✓ Attachments
✓ Restart persistence

No HTTP 500.

==================================================
BLOCKER 3 — DATABASE
==================================================

Create every missing table.

Verify every migration.

Verify every foreign key.

Verify every index.

Verify every trigger.

Verify every RLS policy.

No missing schema.

==================================================
BLOCKER 4 — SECURITY
==================================================

Enable RLS everywhere required.

Verify:

Owner

Admin

Members

Investors

Buyers

Media

Revenue

Transactions

Chat

Landing

Notifications

Return policy verification.

==================================================
BLOCKER 5 — PUSH NOTIFICATIONS
==================================================

Create:

push_tokens

Verify:

Registration

Storage

Delivery

Removal

Token refresh

Android

iOS

==================================================
BLOCKER 6 — REALTIME
==================================================

Verify:

Realtime subscriptions

WebSocket

Reconnect

Presence

Typing

Message delivery

==================================================
BLOCKER 7 — ANDROID QA
==================================================

Install latest APK.

Verify:

Owner login

Feed

Chat

Upload

Notifications

Media

AI

Logout

Restart

Offline recovery

Crash monitoring

Return PASS/FAIL.

==================================================
BLOCKER 8 — IOS QA
==================================================

Build.

Archive.

Install.

Verify:

Login

Feed

Chat

Media

Notifications

AI

==================================================
BLOCKER 9 — FINAL SYNCHRONIZATION
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub HEAD

=

Render

=

/version

=

Production

All identical.

==================================================
BLOCKER 10 — FINAL RELEASE
==================================================

Return only:

PASS

FAIL

BLOCKED

If FAIL:

Return:

Module

Root cause

Files

Commit SHA

Deployment ID

Responsible AI

Fix applied

Remaining blocker

==================================================
ACCEPTANCE
==================================================

Project is complete only when:

✓ Authentication returns correct HTTP status.

✓ Chat works with no RLS recursion.

✓ Database schema is complete.

✓ All RLS policies verified.

✓ Push notifications operational.

✓ Realtime verified.

✓ Android QA passed.

✓ iOS QA passed.

✓ GitHub, Render and Production synchronized.

✓ Overall release status:

🟢 PRODUCTION READY

Every PASS must include production evidence.

Do not return another audit until every blocker is resolved.
